text.title: Feature Flag Rollout Runbook Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying feature-flag-rollout-runbook must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: stages skip from 1% directly to 100% without intermediate cohorts.
rollback_criteria not tied to a numeric SLO threshold.
cleanup_due_date missing OR more than 60 days post-100%.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
